6605c17e7891dce02ea7d07e.leadin: Six small states in this region were collectively referred to as the Gaya Confederacy. For 10 points each:
6605c17e7891dce02ea7d07e.leadin_sanitized: Six small states in this region were collectively referred to as the Gaya Confederacy. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this peninsula, whose Three Kingdoms period ended after it was united under the rule of the Silla.

The Three Kingdoms period consisted of clashes between the Silla, Goguryeo (koh-KUR-yoh), and this Korean state in the southwest, which was governed from Hansong and was ruled by Geunchogo (gwen-CHOH-goh).
Persistent Mongol raids in southern and eastern directions failed to conquer Korea but did eventually establish this dynasty in China after ending the Song.
